---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is not working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## How to reproduce

1. Command run (for example, `uv run guardianeye demo/fall-01.mp4 -o out/fall01`)
2. Input video (source or a short description)
3. What you saw

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- Device (cpu / mps / cuda):
- GuardianEye version (`guardianeye --version`):

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or `metrics.json` snippets if relevant.
